ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Clean up your vault after import. Click a step to begin, or start from the first step.
ast.target: 导入后清理您的保险库。点击一个步骤开始，或从第一步开始。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: No issues found in any category.
ast.target: 在任何类别中均未发现问题。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Click a row to open the person note for editing.
ast.target: 点击一行以打开人物笔记进行编辑。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: These people have multiple parents claiming them. Click a row to open the note and correct the parent references.
ast.target: 这些人物有多个父母声称拥有他们。点击一行以打开笔记并更正父母引用。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Indexed properties (source, source_2, source_3...) will be converted to a sources array.
ast.target: 索引属性（source, source_2, source_3...）将被转换为 sources 数组。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: The singular "person" property will be converted to a "persons" array.
ast.target: 单数的 \"person\" 属性将被转换为 \"persons\" 数组。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: The nested "sourced_facts" object will be converted to flat "sourced_*" properties.
ast.target: 嵌套的 \"sourced_facts\" 对象将被转换为扁平的 \"sourced_*\" 属性。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Inline events will be converted to separate event note files linked via "life_events".
ast.target: 内联事件将被转换为通过 \"life_events\" 链接的独立事件笔记文件。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: The legacy "child" property will be converted to the "children" property.
ast.target: 旧版的 \"child\" 属性将被转换为 \"children\" 属性。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Select variants to standardize. The canonical form is shown on the right.
ast.target: 选择要标准化的变体。规范形式显示在右侧。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Select which file to keep as canonical for each place. Duplicates will be merged and deleted.
ast.target: 选择要保留为每个地点规范的文件。重复项将被合并并删除。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: This will use OpenStreetMap's Nominatim service to look up coordinates. The process respects the API rate limit (1 request per second).
ast.target: 这将使用 OpenStreetMap 的 Nominatim 服务来查找坐标。该过程遵守 API 速率限制（每秒 1 个请求）。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: This will geocode each place, parse the full address into hierarchy components (city → county → state → country), and create or link parent place notes.
ast.target: 这将对每个地点进行地理编码，将完整地址解析为层级组成部分（城市 → 县 → 州 → 国家），并创建或链接父级地点笔记。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: A generated cr_id will be added to each place note so it appears in the place graph and downstream features.
ast.target: 生成的 cr_id 将被添加到每个地点笔记中，以便其出现在地点图和下游功能中。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: If your GEDCOM has full paths like "/media/photos/ancestors/smith/photo.jpg", enter the prefix to strip. Only the filename will be used as a wikilink.
ast.target: 如果你的 GEDCOM 文件包含完整路径，如 \"/media/photos/ancestors/smith/photo.jpg\"，请输入要剥离的前缀。仅文件名将用作 wiki 链接。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Reference numbers help organize and cite individuals in your tree. You can also do this later from the context menu.
ast.target: 参考编号有助于组织和引用你家族树中的个人。你也可以稍后从上下文菜单中执行此操作。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Numbers are assigned relative to this person.
ast.target: 编号是相对于此人分配的。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: These folders are configured in your Preferences settings.
ast.target: 这些文件夹在你的偏好设置中配置。

ast.name: textContent

ast.target: 为此导出指定自定义文件夹。

ast.source: Event notes now use a single "persons" array property instead of separate "person" and "persons" properties. This simplifies data management and enables multi-person events for all event types.
ast.target: 事件笔记现在使用单一的“persons”数组属性，而不是分开的“person”和“persons”属性。这简化了数据管理，并为所有事件类型启用了多人事件功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source:
# Single-person event
person: "[[John Smith]]"

# Multi-person event
persons:
  - "[[John Smith]]"
  - "[[Jane Doe]]"
ast.target:
# 单人事件
person: "[[John Smith]]"

# 多人事件
persons:
  - "[[John Smith]]"
  - "[[Jane Doe]]"

ast.name: text
ast.source:
persons:
  - "[[John Smith]]"

# or for multi-person events:
persons:
  - "[[John Smith]]"
  - "[[Jane Doe]]"
ast.target:
persons:
  - "[[John Smith]]"

# 或用于多人事件：
persons:
  - "[[John Smith]]"
  - "[[Jane Doe]]"

ast.name: text
ast.source: Consistent property name across all event types
ast.target: 所有事件类型使用一致的属性名称

ast.name: text
ast.source: Any event can have multiple participants without schema changes
ast.target: 任何事件都可以有多个参与者，无需更改架构

ast.name: text
ast.source: Simpler queries in Obsidian Bases and Dataview
ast.target: 在 Obsidian Bases 和 Dataview 中查询更简单

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you have event notes using the old "person" property, run the Cleanup Wizard to migrate them automatically. New imports will use the array format.
ast.target: 如果您有使用旧 \"person\" 属性的事件笔记，请运行清理向导进行自动迁移。新导入将使用数组格式。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This version fixes compatibility issues with Obsidian's Properties panel. Two features have been redesigned to use flat property formats that work seamlessly with Obsidian.
ast.target: 此版本修复了与 Obsidian 属性面板的兼容性问题。两项功能已重新设计，采用与 Obsidian 无缝协作的扁平属性格式。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The nested sourced_facts object is replaced with individual flat properties for each fact type.
ast.target: 嵌套的 sourced_facts 对象已被替换为每种事实类型的独立扁平属性。

ast.name: text
ast.source:
sourced_facts:
  birth_date:
    sources:
      - "[[Census 1870]]"
  death_date:
    sources:
      - "[[Death Certificate]]"
ast.target:
sourced_facts:
  birth_date:
    sources:
      - "[[Census 1870]]"
  death_date:
    sources:
      - "[[Death Certificate]]"

ast.name: text
ast.source: Inline events arrays are replaced with links to separate event note files.
ast.target: 内联事件数组已被替换为指向独立事件笔记文件的链接。

ast.name: text
ast.source:
events:
  - event_type: residence
    place: "[[New York]]"
    date_from: "1920"
ast.target:
events:
  - event_type: residence
    place: "[[New York]]"
    date_from: "1920"

ast.name: text
ast.source: No more "Type mismatch" warnings in Properties panel
ast.target: 属性面板不再出现 \"类型不匹配\" 警告

ast.name: text
ast.source: Safe to edit properties without data corruption
ast.target: 可安全编辑属性，不会导致数据损坏

ast.name: text
ast.target: 更好的 Dataview 和 Bases 兼容性

ast.name: text
ast.source: Each event as a note enables linking, tags, and attachments
ast.target: 每个事件作为笔记，支持链接、标签和附件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use the Cleanup Wizard to migrate existing data. The plugin reads both old and new formats, so migration can be done at your convenience.
ast.target: 使用清理向导迁移现有数据。插件同时读取新旧格式，因此迁移可随时进行。
